log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.

→ Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 20] FAIL! 40 necrotic damage. HP: 27/67
--- Mountain Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
